_comment: Full backup of the 15 LinkedIn Recruiter system workflows (complete GET /v1/workflows/{id} incl. all steps/fields). Snapshot from PROD 54-211-23-18; DEV verified identical. Restore with scripts/restore_system_workflows.py.

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: FOCUSED boolean + location search -> extract 30
workflows.description: Focused Recruiter advanced search plus recruiter_search_people extraction capped at 30 candidates. Use this to verify lazy-load scrolling + pagination from /talent/search without saving anything. Params: boolean_query, location. The boolean facet commits on Enter; the location facet commits by selecting the top typeahead suggestion.

selector_chain.value: button[aria-label="Añadir Palabras clave del perfil u operadores booleanos"]

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: save current search URL results to project
workflows.description: Saves candidates from an already-built Recruiter search URL. Use this after a focused search/extract has produced a concrete /talent/search URL, to avoid re-driving the advanced-search facet form. Params: search_url, project_name, target_count.

steps.intent: Open existing Recruiter search results URL
Select result cards and save them to project

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Create project (EasyRecruit, parameterized)
workflows.description: PARAMETERIZED create-project for the Odoo→Recruiter pipeline. Step 5 name = 'EasyRecruit - {{position}}' (backend create_run substitutes runtime_params.position). Final extract step captures the new project URL (/talent/hire/<id>) into extracted_data so the job_project_link push can set hr.job.recruiter_project_url (req C). recruiter_search_people is graceful on the project landing page (waitForSelector .catch → returns [] but still posts {url}). Param: position.

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: AI search by position (parameterized)
workflows.description: PARAMETERIZED AI-Copilot search for the Odoo→Recruiter pipeline. Step 5 types 'Buscar candidatos para: {{position}}' into textarea.copilot-chat-input__textbox + submit (\n) → AI builds & runs the search → extract candidate cards (recruiter_search_people → name + /talent/profile/ URL + headline). backend create_run substitutes runtime_params.position. The AI Copilot is the recording's real search entry (steps 13-15) — far more reliable than the advanced facets. Param: position.

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Save candidate to project (parameterized)
workflows.description: PARAMETERIZED save-to-project for the Odoo→Recruiter pipeline. Step 2 navigates {{candidate_url}} (a /talent/profile/ URL from the search), step 5 types {{project_name}} into the typeahead, step 8 clicks the option by exact text {{project_name}}. backend create_run substitutes runtime_params.{candidate_url,project_name}. The orchestrator fires one of these per candidate (project_name = '-EZ <position>'). Selectors locked offline 2026-06-08. Params: candidate_url, project_name.

steps.intent: Pick the project by exact name

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Archive ALL candidates in a project (remove all)
workflows.description: DEMO/bulk action: removes every candidate from a project by archiving (Recruiter has no hard-delete). Daemon-only recruiter_archive_all_in_project strategy: on the project /manage/all it clicks select-all, fires the bulk archive action, confirms in the modal footer, and loops page by page until the 'Candidatos archivados' counter reaches the saved total. Param: project_url. VERIFIES via the archived counter (archived_after > archived_before).

steps.intent: Archive every candidate in the project and verify

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Add a profile to a project (public /in/ or /talent/profile/) — robust
workflows.description: Adds ONE profile to a project as an active candidate. Daemon-only recruiter_add_profile strategy: navigates {{candidate_url}} (a public /in/<slug> bridges via 'View in Recruiter' to /talent/profile/), opens Save-to-project, switches to existing-project mode, types {{project_name}}, CLICKS the exact dropdown option (typing alone leaves Save disabled — the known gotcha), waits for Save to enable, saves, and VERIFIES via the project's active count ({{project_url}}). Params: candidate_url, project_name, project_url.

steps.intent: Add the profile to the project and verify

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Read a project's candidate counts (read-only)
workflows.description: READ-ONLY verification: navigates the project /manage/all and reports the active ('Todos los candidatos', excludes archived) + archived ('Candidatos archivados') counters and the visible active candidate names. Modifies nothing. Param: project_url.

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: compose bulk InMail from a template ({Nombre} chip) — gated
workflows.description: Messages a project's UNCONTACTED candidates with a template {{body}} — switches to LinkedIn's native 'uncontacted' pipeline stage (SHORTLISTED) and select-alls it, so already-contacted/replied candidates are not re-messaged. Replaces each literal {Name}/{Nombre} token with the LinkedIn variable CHIP. Sets the subject (handles the subject-reveal quirk). send=false (default) STOPS for a snapshot preview; send=true clicks Send (REAL InMail). Params: project_url, body, subject, send.

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: add 'Contactado para <posición>' note (bulk) + move to 'contacted' stage — gated save
workflows.description: Selects a project's ACTIVE candidates, opens the bulk 'Añadir nota' composer (in the collapsible-toolbar overflow 'Más elementos'), types {{note_text}}, sets visibility to the whole company (HIRING_CONTEXT). GATED by save: save=false (default) STOPS for a snapshot preview (and discovers the 'Cambiar fase' options) — NEVER saves; save=true clicks 'Añadir' to save the note, then moves the candidates to the native 'contacted' pipeline stage (data-test-move-to-state=CONTACTED) and verifies via the success toast. Params: project_url, note_text, save.

steps.intent: Locate + type the candidate note (gated, no save)

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: add note to ONE candidate (push)
workflows.description: Push ONE Odoo linkedin.candidate.note to LinkedIn (select candidate by name in a project, add note, gated save).

steps.intent: Select candidate by name + add their note (gated)

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Archive a PROJECT (testing tool)
workflows.description: Testing-only: archives an entire LinkedIn Recruiter project. Navigates /talent/projects, locates the project by id (its /talent/hire/<id> link) or name, opens its overflow '…' menu, clicks 'Archivar proyecto'/'Archive project', confirms, and verifies it left the active projects list. Params: project_url (and/or project_name).

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Archive (remove) a candidate from a project — parameterized
workflows.description: Remove ONE candidate from a project pipeline (Recruiter has no hard-delete → archive). Daemon-only recruiter_archive_candidate strategy: navigates the project's /manage/all (derived from {{project_url}}), locates the candidate by NAME (paginating if needed), clicks the per-row archive button (handles an overflow menu + a confirm modal), then VERIFIES the candidate is no longer in the active pipeline. Params: project_url, candidate_name (optionally profile_url). Fired by POST /v1/recruiter/leads/remove when an Odoo linkedin.lead is deleted; on verified removal the backend deletes the Odoo lead (/akcr/api/lead_removed). The verify gate makes an unconfirmed run safe (lead stays pending, re-runnable).

steps.intent: Archive the target candidate from the project and verify removal

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Save recommended matches to the project (automated sourcing)
workflows.description: Adds a project's RECOMMENDED candidates (LinkedIn Automated Sourcing → Recommended matches, /discover/automatedSourcing/review) to the pipeline. The recruiter_save_recommendations strategy hovers each recommendation row and clicks its 'Save to first stage' button (data-test-save-to-first-stage), up to target_count (default 10), collecting name+profile_url; verifies the project's ACTIVE count rose. Returns `people` so the backend can push them as linkedin.lead. Params: project_url, target_count.

steps.intent: Add recommended matches to the project

workflows.name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Open Talent Home
workflows.description: Health-check / demo: daemon opens /talent/home using the staged Recruiter session (.linkedin-profile). Read-only.
